notes: Default shape: N=32, H=W=200, groups=16, cpg=kpg=16, R=S=3, pad=1.
Correctness gate: grouped CPU reference, fp32 accumulation, fp16 output, bad=0 at abs tolerance 1e-2.
Performance note: standalone no-verify runs reach ~210 TFLOPS on this workspace, which is in the high-performance band for this shape on gfx950.
The example-test path runs verify first, so the lower bound is intentionally conservative to avoid thermal/cache noise from the large CPU reference.
